title: Login page not loading
description: Customer reports that the login page stays blank after clicking the login button.

title: Payment declined but money deducted
description: Customer was charged but received a payment declined message during checkout.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset email is not being received by the customer.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launching on Android devices.

title: Profile picture not updating
description: Customer cannot update profile picture; upload fails with unknown error.

title: Order history missing
description: Customer's previous orders are not visible in the dashboard.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: Customer does not receive OTP code during login attempt.

title: Slow loading dashboard
description: Dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to fully load.

title: Error 500 on settings page
description: Internal server error appears when accessing account settings.

title: Subscription cancellation issue
description: Customer unable to cancel subscription from billing section.
